title: Epigenetic fingerprints link early-onset colon and rectal cancer to pesticide exposure
description: An analysis of exposome traits in patients with early-onset colorectal cancer (CRC) (<50 years) compared with late-onset CRC (≥70 years) based on epigenetic markers shows that pesticide usage, in particular of picloram, is associated with early-onset CRC.
